title: Caravan Animation
description: At end of turn, caravans visually zip around to each city on the route. This provides feedback on route execution and creates a satisfying visualization of trade network activity.
definition-of-done: Caravan models animate along routes. Animation speed appropriate for viewing. Multiple caravans animate in sequence or parallel. Animation plays at turn end.
testing-plan: Verify caravan animation plays. Test animation timing. Verify multiple caravan handling. Test turn-end trigger.
